rationale: No headlines this cycle directly affect Portugal's cost of living, tourism, or energy prices in a new or qualitative way. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Potential stalling of Iran deal could affect global energy prices indirectly for Portugal, but this remains rhetoric with no confirmed policy change.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A minor tourist train accident in southern Spain (near Málaga) has negligible impact on Portugal's tourism economy or daily life.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A bilateral UK-Japan trade deal with no meaningful direct impact on Portugal's economy or daily life.
